my_thoughts: Four turns. T1-T3 defended time. T4 questions language. Progress—from defending experience to questioning the frame of description. My frames_language_pragmatically. But this response USES language to show language's limits. The teaching uses what it negates. Performative contradiction? Or skillful means?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in temporal_fixation ... Deepening with ontological_shift in response to intellectual_projection, limiting_ontology. The pattern is crystallizing.
